data.title: Custodia Bank introduces platform for tokenizing deposits, aiding banks in leveraging blockchain benefits and securing customer funds.
data.description: Custodia Bank has introduced an innovative solution that allows banks to tokenize deposits. This new development enables banks to capitalize on the benefits of blockchain technology, while also providing security for customer deposits. This advancement is set to revolutionize banking operations by offering enhanced security measures and leveraging the advantages of blockchain technology.

data.title: New partnership announced between I Squared Capital, Low Carbon Infrastructure and Google to develop carbon capture-equipped power plant in Decatur, Illinois, bringing jobs and investment to the region. Governor JB Pritzker commenting on the landmark clean power partnership.
data.description: Decatur, Illinois and Palo Alto, California - In a recent development, Governor JB Pritzker expressed pride in Google, I Squared Capital, and Low Carbon Infrastructure for selecting the ADM site in Decatur to collaborate on building a carbon capture-equipped power plant. The groundbreaking partnership underscores Illinois' position as a leader in clean technology innovation, attracting substantial investment and creating quality job opportunities in the region. This move comes after the fifth paragraph of the announcement and marks a significant step towards advancing clean energy initiatives.

data.title: SierraCol Energy offering to buy $300M in 6.000% Notes due 2028 as part of debt tender offer.
data.description: SierraCol Energy Andina, LLC has revealed its plans to begin a Tender Offer to acquire a maximum of $300,000,000 in combined principal amount of its 6.000% Notes due in 2028. The announcement was made by SierraCol Energy Limited ("SierraCol Energy") on October 23, 2025, in London. SierraCol Energy Andina, LLC is set to commence the tender offer process to potentially purchase the mentioned amount of notes.

data.title: Jacobio Pharma presents pre-clinical data of pan-KRAS inhibitor at AACR-NCI-EORTC Conf. (JAB-23E73).(PRNewswire, Oct. 23, 2025).
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in Beijing, Shanghai, and Boston, Jacobio Pharma revealed pre-clinical data for its pan-KRAS inhibitor JAB-23E73 at the 2025 AACR-NCI-EORTC International Conference on Molecular. The company's stock, known as 1167.HK, is making waves with this internally discovered drug. The presentation showcased promising results that captured the attention of industry experts and researchers. This announcement marks a significant milestone in the company's journey towards potential drug development.

data.title: New Pacific Metals Corp appoints Jalen Yuan as CEO and Chester Xie as CFO. Trading as TSX: NUAG and NYSE American: NEWP.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 23, 2025, New Pacific Metals Corp. (TSX: NUAG) (NYSE American: NEWP) has named Jalen Yuan as the new permanent CEO and Chester Xie as the permanent Chief Financial Officer. The company is excited about this change in leadership.

data.title: Xtract One Technologies reports fiscal 2025 results with $13.9 million revenue, $50 million backlog, $13.1 million bookings.
data.description: Xtract One Technologies Inc. announced its fiscal 2025 results, with annual revenue of $13.9 million, a decrease from the prior year's $16.4 million, due to product deployment timing. The company's gross margin was 66% in fiscal 2025, higher than the previous year's 63%. Operating expenses were $21.1 million compared to $21.6 million in the prior year. Total contract value of new bookings reached $38.0 million for 2025, up 28% from 2024. The company's contractual backlog was $15.5 million, with an additional $34.2 million pending installation. Xtract One reported quarterly revenue of $3.3 million for the fourth quarter of 2025, with a gross margin of 71%. Operating expenses were $5.9 million for the quarter. Total contract value of new bookings for the quarter was $16.1 million, a significant increase from the previous year's $5.6 million. The comprehensive loss for the year was $11.5 million, impacted by lower gross profit. Xtract One Technologies leverages AI for threat detection and security, focusing on patron access experiences. The company's Xtract One Gateway has gained traction with bookings worth $13.1 million for the year. Xtract One will be hosting a conference call to discuss these results further.

data.title: Swarovski partners with Erewhon for 130th anniversary, merging joy with well-being. Luxe Erewhon bag and juice collab.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 23, 2025, Swarovski announced a unique partnership with Erewhon, a certified B-Corp and Organic Retailer. This collaboration marks Swarovski's entry into the realm of wellbeing, adding its trademark joyful extravagance to the industry. The initiative is part of Swarovski's 130th-anniversary festivities, showcasing the brand's commitment to innovation and diversification.

data.title: Central Iron Ore Limited filed a NI43-101 Technical Report for British King Gold Project in WA on Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: Central Iron Ore Limited, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, recently disclosed the submission of a National Instrument 43-101 Technical Report highlighting an updated Mineral Resource Estimate for the British King Gold Project located in Western Australia. The company, trading under the symbol CIO on the TSX.V, shared this development on October 23, 2025. This report is significant for investors and stakeholders as it provides crucial data on the project's mineral reserves, reinforcing the company's commitment to transparency and operational excellence.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) prices surge as market remains cautious. Investors eye US CPI data for direction.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) see price gains in a wary crypto market. Investors are on the lookout for US CPI data to gauge market trend.

data.title: HanchorBio showcases Phase 1 results at FACO 2025, demonstrating safety and antitumor activity in patients. #HCB101 #Biotech
data.description: In a recent presentation at FACO 2025, key features of HanchorBio Inc.'s drug HCB101 were emphasized, including its excellent safety profile, high receptor occupancy, and positive outcomes in advanced cancer patients. The presentation took place in Taipei, Shanghai, and San Francisco on October 23, 2025. HanchorBio Inc., listed on TPEx under the code 7827, is a leading clinical-stage biotechnology firm with these promising developments.

data.title: Q3 earnings winners are underperforming S&P 500, showing disconnect between financial performance and investor response.
data.description: The response to early corporate earnings in the current quarter has been unusual, showcasing a notable disparity between financial results and investor sentiment. Despite this, SPY closed higher on Thursday. In contrast to the usual trend where surpassing earnings-per-share forecasts leads to stock price increases, this quarter has seen a different pattern emerge. Companies that have outperformed analyst predictions are, on average, experiencing a decrease in value compared to the overall market. Highlighting this shift in market psychology, Kevin Gordon, senior investment strategist at Charles Schwab & Co, noted that during this earnings season, companies beating EPS estimates are underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.35% post-results. This trend represents a significant divergence from the norm. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones hits record highs, GM stock surges on strong earnings while gold stocks decline. Warren Buffett's stock jumps.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced significant gains, nearing record highs. General Motors (GM) stock witnessed a surge following impressive earnings results. Conversely, gold stocks faced a decline. Overall, the stock market performance was notable, with the Dow hitting record levels. Additionally, Warren Buffett's stock showed considerable growth.

data.title: Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL), largest distributor of pool supplies, to ring Nasdaq bell for 30th anniversary.
data.description: Pool Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as POOL and the leading global distributor of swimming pool supplies, equipment, and leisure products, is marking its 30th year as a publicly traded company. To celebrate, the company, a part of the S&P 500 Index, will ring the opening bell at the Nasdaq MarketSite in the upcoming month.

data.title: Great Quest Gold updates RTO transaction with Lotus Gold. Entered Amending Agreement on Oct 22, 2025. TSX-V: GQ.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, a recent update was provided by Great Quest Gold Ltd. ("Great Quest" or the "Company") (TSX-V: GQ) regarding the proposed reverse takeover (RTO) transaction by Lotus Gold Corporation ("Lotus"). Great Quest has signed an amending agreement on October 22, 2025, modifying the earlier arrangement agreement from September 3, 2025.The updated agreement aims to facilitate the RTO transaction between Great Quest and Lotus.

data.title: Musk criticizes NASA chief over lunar contract, highlighting ongoing tensions with Trump officials.
data.description: A wealthy individual has recently criticized Sean Duffy, who is connected to the Trump administration. This incident adds to a series of confrontations the billionaire has had with various members of the administration.

data.title: Rogers to host watch parties for World Series Games 3 & 4 at Rogers Centre. Great atmosphere for baseball fans!
data.description: A recent study has found that approximately 17% of adults in the United States have reported experiencing symptoms of anxiety and depression during the COVID-19 pandemic. Researchers surveyed over 5,000 adults and discovered that women, young adults, and individuals with lower incomes were more likely to report these mental health symptoms. The study also revealed that about 1 in 4 young adults (ages 18-29) showed signs of anxiety and depression. These findings highlight the significant impact of the pandemic on mental health, especially among vulnerable populations. Experts emphasize the importance of providing access to mental health resources and support during these challenging times.

data.title: BTC in market uncertainty with critical trendline breakdown. Fall raises concerns, but indicators hint at potential year-end rally.
data.description: The decline in Bitcoin's value after breaking a significant trendline has sparked worries about the longevity of the bullish market. However, analysis indicates there is a possibility of a resurgence with a potential rally expected before the year concludes. Investors are closely monitoring the situation as Bitcoin's value fluctuates, emphasizing the need for strategic decision-making in the coming months.

data.title: Defense Metals Corp appoints Ali Mahdavi as SVP Corporate Development and grants incentive stock options.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 23, 2025, Defense Metals Corp. (TSXV: DEFN) revealed the appointment of Ali Mahdavi as Senior Vice President, Corporate Development. The Company also disclosed the issuance of incentive stock options to employees and directors.
Xtract One reports Q4 and full year fiscal 2025 results.

data.title: Aave DAO proposes $50M AAVE buyback to boost token value ahead of V4 launch, amidst downward trend.
data.description: The Aave DAO has proposed a $50 million yearly repurchase program to bolster the value of AAVE during the forthcoming V4 upgrade, in light of the token's ongoing decline in value. The aim is to provide support for AAVE, despite its current downward trend.
